from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Any

@dataclass
class QueryFilter:
    field: str
    operator: str
    value: Any

def build_query(filters: list[QueryFilter], order_by: str | None = None) -> str:
    clauses = [f"{f.field} {f.operator} {f.value}" for f in filters]
    query = " AND ".join(clauses)
    if order_by:
        query += f" ORDER BY {order_by}"
    return query

def log_event(event_type: str, metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None):
    parts = [event_type]
    if metadata:
        parts.extend(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in metadata.items())
    print(" | ".join(parts))

@dataclass
class Config:
    name: str
    options: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
    extra_positional: list[Any] = field(default_factory=list)

def create_config(name: str, options: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> Config:
    return Config(name=name, options=options or {})
